notes: Each bar counts the DISTINCT trials studied in that country; a trial spanning multiple countries is counted once per country, so bar totals sum to MORE than the trial count -- the headline count_basis.trials is the distinct-trial total (CC-3).
Ranked bar, top 50 by trial count; 41 lower-count country values are folded into the derived 'Other' bucket (which cites its members).

Country is a free-text display name with no ISO code, so this is a ranked bar, never a choropleth; a multi-country trial is deduped to one count per country (CC-13). Common spelling variants are normalized to a canonical form before counting (e.g. USA / U.S. → United States), so variant spellings are merged into one bar (E-20).
